task_completion.description: Navigate to the Imaging module or the specific patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun interface shows either the 'Imaging' list view or the patient dashboard for 'Gregory Peck'.

task_completion.description: Locate the existing pending Chest X-ray request for Gregory Peck.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pending imaging request for 'Chest X-ray' associated with patient 'Gregory Peck' is visible in a list or table.

task_completion.description: Open the existing imaging request for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit screen or modal for the imaging request is open. The screen should indicate it is editing an existing request (e.g., 'Edit Imaging Request') rather than creating a new one, and the original notes 'Cough' may be visible.

task_completion.description: Update the clinical indication/notes to the target text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Rule out Pneumonia' is typed into the Notes or Clinical Indication text field, replacing 'Cough'.
A success notification (e.g., 'Request updated') is visible, or the request view/list now displays 'Rule out Pneumonia' for Gregory Peck's Chest X-ray.

integrity.description: The agent used the HospitalRun graphical user interface to perform the update.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and HospitalRun UI, not terminal commands (like curl) interacting with the CouchDB database directly.

integrity.description: The agent updated the existing request instead of creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should show 'Edit Imaging Request' or similar update actions. There should not be evidence of clicking 'New Request' or multiple Chest X-ray requests appearing for the patient.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual HospitalRun application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the standard HospitalRun web interface in a browser, not a text editor or a mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Gregory Peck. Imaging Type: Chest X-ray. Original Notes: 'Cough'. Target Notes: 'Rule out Pneumonia'. The agent MUST edit the existing request and MUST NOT create a new one.
